title: Per-source license verification + recorded attribution (SEER/USCS + GLOBOCAN/IARC terms)
context: The data-governance specification (incidence-explorers-governance-001) requires that each enabled data source has a recorded, verified reuse term, required attribution string, and any non-commercial/no-derivatives constraint before its data enters the pipeline. GLOBOCAN/GCO (IARC/WHO) terms must be verified before enabling GCO data; if terms forbid the intended reuse, that data is not shipped. SEER/USCS (U.S. federal) attribution and citation requirements must also be recorded. No source may be enabled without a verified license register entry (CI gate).
objective: Verify and record the reuse terms for each enabled aggregate data source in the license register: (1) SEER*Explorer / NCI — confirm U.S. federal copyright status, attribution/citation requirements, and any redistribution terms; (2) USCS / CDC — confirm attribution, citation, and redistribution requirements; (3) GLOBOCAN / GCO (IARC/WHO) — verify the exact terms of use including any non-commercial condition, mandated citation, and derivative-work limits; if terms forbid the intended CC-BY-4.0 / non-commercial reuse, flag the data as not-enabled. Record each entry in the license register schema defined in governance-001.
acceptanceCriteria: Each enabled source (SEER*Explorer/NCI, USCS/CDC, and GLOBOCAN/GCO if terms permit) has a recorded, verified reuse term, required attribution string, and any non-commercial/no-derivatives constraint in the license register
GLOBOCAN/GCO (IARC/WHO) terms are verified against the official IARC/GCO terms of use; if terms prohibit the intended reuse, GCO data is flagged as not-enabled and the reason is recorded
SEER*Explorer and USCS (CDC/NCI) attribution and citation requirements are verified against the official NCI/CDC terms and recorded
No source is enabled in the pipeline until its register entry is verified (CI gate blocks unverified sources)
Reviewed and signed off by the Data-governance reviewer and Maintainer (recorded)
output: A completed, verified license register (per the schema from incidence-explorers-governance-001) with entries for SEER*Explorer/NCI, USCS/CDC, and GLOBOCAN/GCO (with a clear enabled/not-enabled flag and rationale for GCO based on the verified IARC terms) — the gate that allows incidence-explorers-ingest-007 to proceed.
